SLT: Super Long Taper (2.5mm+). Minimizes skin resistance. Equivalent to: Kwadron Extreme LT, Bishop Nano-Taper, Peak XL-Taper.
TX: Textured Surface. Micro-grooved to hold 20% more pigment. Equivalent to: Kwadron Textured, Cheyenne Safety TX.
Open Liner: Parallel Needle Geometry. Not squeezed at the tip for bold, hollow lines. Brand Equivalent: Cheyenne OL Series (or use any pro Round Shader).
#10: 0.30mm Diameter. The 'Bugpin' standard for smooth gradients. Equivalent: Kwadron Blue Box, Bishop #10.
Hanging: The length of needle protruding from the tip. 1.5mm is standard for lining; 2.0mm+ is preferred for 'floating' the needle in shading.
